Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dread's obsession with recapturing his shard overrules all reason. Rusty Rose agrees the shard is too powerful for any one person, including Sonic.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Rebel Rouge and Renegade Knuckles walk the newly liberated streets of New Yoke City unsure of what's next, until the Mothership redocks atop the Yoke.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. Our three Neanderthal friends discover fire, only to put it out.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Mr Krabs opens the Krabbiest place on earth in 'Krabby Land', and in 'The Camping Episode', SpongeBob and Patrick decide to go camping - in the back yard.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Elliot tries to trick Kiki into doing his chores in 'Chore and Peace', then in 'Hypno- Weenie', Karla discovers she has a talent for hypnosis.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog and Elliot open up a hair salon in 'Shear Audacity', then in 'Karlita's Way', Karla is forced to reveal her greatest talent and shame.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Alvin and Eleanor train to be lifeguards in 'The Lifeguard', then in 'Scarecrowner', Miss Croner's prized cherries go missing, and she suspects crows - but could it be chipmunks.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Munks help a world-famous runner in 'Run Aimee Run', then in 'Theo vs Simon', Theodore embarks on a quest to find one thing he can do better than Simon, but it won't be so easy.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them - and their "world tour" - himself.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: SpongeBob needs the help of a psychiatrist, but gets only Plankton, in 'Fear Of A Krabby Patty', and then in 'Shell Of A Man', Mr. Krabs is getting ready for a big reunion.
